title: NVIDIA Research Advances Robotics From Simulation to the Real World
summary: Robotics is entering a new phase: moving from controlled demos and scripted automation toward generalizable, reliable embodied autonomy in the real world.  At the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), eight of NVIDIA Research’s 28 accepted papers show how simulation-to-real transfer is becoming a foundation for that shift, helping robots perceive, reason, plan and […]
title_es: NVIDIA avanza en robótica: del simulador a la realidad
bajada: NVIDIA Research presentó 8 papers en ICRA que demuestran cómo la transferencia simulación-realidad es clave para desarrollar robots autónomos confiables. Este avance abre el camino hacia máquinas que pueden percibir, razonar y planificar en entornos reales sin scripts predefinidos.
bajada_en: NVIDIA Research presented 8 papers at ICRA demonstrating how simulation-to-real transfer is crucial for developing reliable autonomous robots. This breakthrough enables machines to perceive, reason, and plan in real-world environments without predefined scripts.

title: Illinois Lawmakers Just Passed America’s Strongest AI Safety Bill
summary: The bill requires companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google to have third parties confirm they’re following safety standards. Illinois governor JB Pritzker says he’ll sign it.
title_es: Illinois aprueba la ley de IA más estricta de EE.UU.
bajada: Illinois aprobó una ley que requiere que empresas como OpenAI, Anthropic y Google demuestren cumplimiento de estándares de seguridad mediante auditorías de terceros. El gobernador JB Pritzker se ha comprometido a firmarla, sentando precedente regulatorio para el país.
bajada_en: Illinois passed a law requiring companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google to prove compliance with safety standards through third-party audits. Governor JB Pritzker committed to signing it, setting regulatory precedent for the nation.

title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
summary: The colorful I/O logo against a black background, surrounded by stills from the I/O keynote
title_es: Google I/O 2026: Los 12 momentos clave en IA
bajada: Google presentó sus avances más importantes en IA durante su conferencia anual I/O 2026. La empresa mostró innovaciones que abarcan desde modelos hasta aplicaciones prácticas para desarrolladores.
bajada_en: Google presented its major AI breakthroughs at the annual I/O 2026 conference. The company showcased innovations ranging from models to practical applications for developers.

title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
summary: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience powered and standalone Siri app.
title_es: Apple prepara Siri rediseñado para competir con ChatGPT
bajada: Renders filtrados muestran los planes de Apple para iOS 27, incluyendo una experiencia de Siri completamente rediseñada con capacidades de IA mejoradas. La empresa busca competir directamente con asistentes de IA conversacionales establecidos.
bajada_en: Leaked renders show Apple's plans for iOS 27, featuring a complete Siri redesign with enhanced AI capabilities. The company aims to directly compete with established conversational AI assistants.

title: Amazon Thinks the Future of Data Centers Depends on a Technical Problem It Just Solved
summary: The tech giant says a breakthrough in data center networking has dramatically accelerated the flow of information through its massive cloud infrastructure.
title_es: Amazon resuelve problema crítico en centros de datos
bajada: Amazon anunció un avance en networking de centros de datos que acelera significativamente el flujo de información en su infraestructura cloud. El breakthrough es considerado clave para el futuro escalable de los data centers.
bajada_en: Amazon announced a breakthrough in data center networking that dramatically accelerates information flow in its cloud infrastructure. The advance is considered critical for scalable data center futures.

title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
summary: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.
title_es: El verdadero desafío de la IA empresarial: seguridad
bajada: El cofundador de Databricks explica en TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 que la IA empresarial entró en una nueva fase donde las empresas ya no evalúan si la IA es útil, sino si es segura implementarla a escala. Este cambio refleja maduración del mercado.
bajada_en: Databricks' co-founder explained at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 that enterprise AI entered a new phase where companies no longer evaluate if AI is useful, but whether it's safe to deploy broadly. This shift reflects market maturation.

title: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
summary: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Thursday, also alleges that Perplexity provides users with information locked behind CNN's subscription. Perplexity, which offers an AI "answer" engine along with […]
title_es: CNN demanda a Perplexity por copiar artículos
bajada: CNN presentó una demanda contra Perplexity alegando que sus herramientas de IA generan copias 'verbatim' de su contenido y revelan información protegida por suscripción. El caso abre debate sobre derechos de autor en IA.
bajada_en: CNN sued Perplexity alleging its AI tools generate 'verbatim' copies of its content and expose subscription-protected information. The case opens debate on copyright issues in AI.

title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
title_es: Cisco y OpenAI rediseñan ingeniería empresarial con Codex
bajada: Cisco y OpenAI colaboran en Codex para transformar la ingeniería empresarial con desarrollo AI-native. La solución acelera el trabajo en defensa de IA y automatiza remedición de defectos en escala.
bajada_en: Cisco and OpenAI collaborate on Codex to transform enterprise engineering with AI-native development. The solution accelerates AI defense work and automates defect remediation at scale.

title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
title_es: Modelos frontier obtienen bajo rendimiento en tareas IT
bajada: El benchmark ITBench-AA de Artificial Analysis e IBM revela que modelos frontier puntúan por debajo del 50% en tareas agentic de IT empresarial. El resultado evidencia brecha en capacidades de automatización de tareas técnicas complejas.
bajada_en: The ITBench-AA benchmark from Artificial Analysis and IBM reveals frontier models score below 50% on agentic enterprise IT tasks. The result highlights a gap in complex technical task automation capabilities.

title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
summary: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.
title_es: Disputa sobre contrato de Anthropic con SpaceX
bajada: Elon Musk afirma públicamente que el acuerdo de computación entre xAI y Anthropic es a corto plazo y cancelable, aunque el documento S-1 de SpaceX menciona pagos hasta mayo de 2029. La discrepancia genera incertidumbre sobre el futuro de la relación.
bajada_en: Elon Musk publicly claims the compute deal between xAI and Anthropic is short-term and cancellable, while SpaceX's S-1 filing mentions payments through May 2029. The discrepancy raises uncertainty about the relationship's future.

title: YouTube will let you ask AI to make a custom video feed
summary: YouTube is launching a new AI feature that creates a personalized video feed based on descriptions of what you want to watch. In its announcement, YouTube says custom content feeds can be built around your specific interests, moods, or favorite topics, which you can then pin to the top of your YouTube homepage - making […]
title_es: YouTube lanza feed personalizado basado en IA
bajada: YouTube permite a los usuarios crear feeds de video personalizados describiendo qué quieren ver usando IA. La nueva función genera contenido adaptado a intereses, estados de ánimo o temas favoritos, que pueden fijarse al inicio de la página principal.
bajada_en: YouTube lets users create personalized video feeds by describing what they want to watch using AI. The new feature generates content tailored to interests, moods, or favorite topics, which can be pinned to the homepage.

title: Here Comes Ojai, Waymo’s New Chinese-Made Robotaxi
summary: The pale-blue Ojai vehicles will start picking up members of the public in California and Arizona today.
title_es: Waymo lanza Ojai, su robotaxi fabricado en China
bajada: Waymo comenzó operaciones con su nuevo vehículo autónomo Ojai en California y Arizona. Los taxis de color azul claro marcan la expansión de la flota de Waymo con tecnología fabricada en China.
bajada_en: Waymo launched operations with its new autonomous vehicle Ojai in California and Arizona. The pale-blue taxis mark the expansion of Waymo's fleet with Chinese-manufactured technology.

title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
summary: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.
title_es: Sesame, startup de fundadores de Oculus, lanza app iOS
bajada: Sesame, la startup de IA conversacional de los fundadores de Oculus, lanzó su aplicación iOS con agentes de IA diseñados para conversaciones naturales. La herramienta busca ofrecer interacciones más humanas que los chatbots tradicionales.
bajada_en: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launched its iOS app featuring AI agents designed for natural conversations. The tool aims to provide more human-like interactions than traditional chatbots.

title: May 27, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers
summary: Announcements Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers May 27, 2026 Anthropic will open a new office in Milan, our sixth in Europe alongside London, Dublin, Paris, Zurich, and Munich. The Milan team will work with Italian companies and the country's developer community on building and scaling with Claude responsibly, and contribute to a conversation about AI that is already underway across Italian industry and public life. This office opening closely follows the release of Magnifica Humanitas , Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical and the first papal teaching dedicated to artificial intelligence. Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah was invited to speak at its presentation , where he addressed the ethical questions AI raises and called on more of the world—religious traditions, civil society, academia, and governments—to shape a positive outcome for humanity. Anthropic’s frontier AI capabilities and an abiding commitment to safety have already earned the trust of Italian enterprise. Led by Thomas Remy, Anthropic’s Head of Southern Europe, our local team is already working with a wide range of Italian companies, including Generali Group and Unipol Group in finance, Angelini Pharma and Bracco Group in life sciences, Enel Group in energy, and Pirelli in automotive. Anthropic has also partnered with JAKALA, one of Europe's leading data and AI companies, to deploy Claude across more than 3,000 seats to free up roughly 70% of senior team time for higher-judgment client work. Italian startups and technology companies have been early adopters, too. Satispay, the financial super app serving more than six million users, deployed Claude across its engineering teams, compressing an 18-month roadmap into seven months and updating its core payment system ten times faster than planned. At Bending Spoons, one of Italy’s largest technology companies, the majority of code changes are now co-authored with Claude Code. Anthropic is also putting Claude
title_es: Anthropic abre oficina en Milán para empresas europeas
bajada: Anthropic inauguró su sexta oficina en Europa en Milán, reforzando su presencia en el mercado italiano. La expansión coincide con creciente adopción de Claude por empresas italianas como Generali e Unipol.
bajada_en: Anthropic opened its sixth European office in Milan, strengthening its presence in the Italian market. The expansion coincides with growing adoption of Claude by Italian enterprises like Generali and Unipol.

title: May 26, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea ahead of Seoul office opening
summary: Announcements Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea ahead of Seoul office opening May 26, 2026 Korea is one of the most active markets in the world for Claude.ai. According to our latest Economic Index , Koreans use Claude at more than 3.5 times the rate expected for the population size, with usage skewing heavily toward technical and creative work. To support that momentum, KiYoung Choi is joining Anthropic as Representative Director of Korea, ahead of the opening of our Seoul office . In the coming weeks, senior leadership from Anthropic will travel to Seoul to officially open the office and meet with customers. KiYoung joins from Snowflake, where he served as General Manager for Korea. He brings over three decades of experience leading technology businesses across Korea and Asia-Pacific. Throughout his career, he has helped some of the largest Korean enterprises navigate transformative shifts in technology, ranging from cloud computing to AI adoption. Previously, he held country leadership roles at Google Cloud, Adobe, Autodesk, and Microsoft. “Korea is one of the most sophisticated AI markets in the world, leading in hardware innovation, developer activity, and enterprise adoption,” KiYoung said. “Korean organizations combine technical depth with a commitment to responsible deployment, which is exactly where Anthropic operates. That alignment is what brought me to Anthropic—and why we are focused on building in Korea for the long term.” At Anthropic, KiYoung will lead a go-to-market strategy that supports the unique uses of Claude in Korea. Innovative startups and leading enterprises in Korea are already building with Claude. Law&Company uses Claude to power its AI legal assistant, helping lawyers reduce time spent on legal research and document preparation while maintaining high accuracy for sensitive legal work. SK Telecom , the largest telecommunications company in Korea, chose Claude to build a custom AI customer service model,
title_es: Anthropic nombra director para Corea del Sur
bajada: Anthropic contrató a KiYoung Choi como Director Representante de Corea, anticipando la apertura de su oficina en Seúl. Corea usa Claude a 3.5 veces la tasa esperada según el Economic Index de Anthropic.
bajada_en: Anthropic hired KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea ahead of its Seoul office opening. Korea uses Claude at 3.5 times the expected rate according to Anthropic's Economic Index.
